D1.details: Phono. tp. Det. or Ideo. for tp “head,” tpy “first, chief.” Det. ḏ3ḏ3“head.”

D4.details: Phono. iri “to do, make.” Ideo. for irt “eye.”

D10.details: Det. or Ideo. for w3ḏt “wedjat eye.”

D19.details: Det. or Ideo. for fnd “nose.” Det. sn “smell,” rš “rejoice.”

D35.details: Phono. n. Ideo. for n and nn, “not.” Det. negation.

D39.details: Det. for offer, present. ex. ḥnk “present,” drp “offer.”

D52.details: Phono. mt. Det. for male. ex. ʿ3 “ass,” ṯ3y “male.” Ideo. k3 “bull.”

D53.details: Det. for male, penis. ex. m b3ḥ “in the presence of” ḏr b3ḥ “since,” r b3ḥ “before.”

D54.details: Phono. iw in iwi “come.” Det. for motion.

D56.details: Phono. pd. Det. for leg, foot. ex. rd “leg,” pd “knee.”

E1.details: Det. of cattle. ex. ng “bull,” mnmnt “cattle.” Ideo. in k3 “bull.”

E17.details: Det. or Ideo. in s3b “jackal” and “dignitary.”

E23.details: Phon. rw. Det. or Ideo. in rw “lion.”

F12.details: Phon. wsr. Ideo in wsrt “neck.” In wsr “powerful”

F13.details: Phon. wp. Ideo. in wpt “brow, beginning.”

F16.details: Phono. ʿb. Det. or Ideo. in db “horn,” ʿb “horn.” In m-ʿb “together with.”

F18.details: Phono. bḥ, ḥw. Det. and Ideo. in ibḥ “tooth.” Det. in sbḥ “cry.”

F21.details: Phono. sḏm, idn. Det. or Ideo. in msḏr “ear. Ideo. sḏm, “hear.”

F22.details: Phono. pḥ in “reach,” pḥty “strength.” Ideo. for pḥwy “end.”

F23.details: Det. or Ideo. in ḫpš “strong arm, leg.”

F29.details: Phono. st. Det. and Ideo. sti “pierce, shoot.”

F30.details: Phono. šd. In šdi “draw forth,” šdw “water skin.”

F32.details: Phono. ẖ. Ideo. in ẖt “belly, body.”

F40.description: Backbone and spinal cord at each end

G7.details: Det. imn “Amun,” nsw “king,” divine. 1st sing. pro. i, wi, with divine speaker.

G39.details: Phono. s3. In s3 “son.” Det. in si “duck.”

H6.details: Phono. šw. Ideo. in šwt “feather.” Det. and Ideo. in m3ʿt “truth.”

L1.details: Phono. ḫpr. In ḫpr “being, exist, become.

M3.details: Phono. ḫt. In ḫt “wood,” ḫtyw “terrace,” nḫt “strong.”

M4.details: Ideo. in rnpt “year,” ḥsbt “regnal year.” Det. in tr “time.”

M12.details: Phono. ḫ3. In ḫ3w nw sšn “lily plants” ḫ3 “1,000,” sḫ3 “remember.”

M16.details: Phono. ḥ3 . In ḥ3q “capture.” Det. in “The Delta.”

M17.details: Phono. i. Phono. y, when doubled.

M26.details: Phono. šmʿ. Ideo. šmʿw in “Upper Egypt.”

M42.details: Phono. wn. In wnm “eat,” ḥwn “be young.”

N14.details: Phono. sb3, dw3. In sb3 “star,” dw3 “morning.” Ideo. wnwt “hour.”

N16.details: Phono. t3. In t3 “land, earth.”Det. in ḏt “eternity.”

N25.details: Ideo. in ḫ3st “foreign land, hill country.”

N41.details: Phono. ḥm. In ḥmt “wife.” Det. in bi3 “copper.”

O11.details: Bilit. aH. Ideo. palace, palace facade.

O50.details: Phono. sp. In sp “occasion, time, event,” sp sn “two times.”

P1.details: Det. of boats. In dpt “ship,” ḥʿw “ships,” ḫdi “sail downstream.”

P8.details: Phono ḫrw. In m3ʿ ḫrw “justified” ḫrw “voice,” ḫrwy “enemy.”

P13.details: Trilit. xrw. Used in nautical contexts.

Q1.details: Phono. st, ws. In st “seat, place,” wsir “Osiris,” ḥtm “perish.”

Q7.details: Det. of fire. In ḫt “fire,” sḏt “flame,” srf “temperature.”

R4.details: Phono. ḥtp. In ḥtp “altar, rest, be pleased.”

S29.details: Phono. s. In ʿnḫ.(w) (w)ḏ3 snb “may he live, be prosperous, be healthy.” (L.P.H.)

S34.details: Phono. ʿnḫ. In ʿnḫ “live,” ʿnḫ “sandal strap.”

S42.details: Phono. sḫm. In sḫm “have power,” sḫm “scepter.” Det. or Ideo. in ḫrp “manage, at head.”

T30.details: Ideo. for dmt “knife.” Det. in dm “be sharp.”

U15.details: Phono. tm. In tm “be complete,” ḥtm “perish.”

U28.details: Phono. ḏ3. In ʿnḫ.(w) (w)ḏ3 snb “may he live, be prosperous, be healthy.” (L.P.H.)

W15.details: Det. or Ideo. in qbb, qbḥ “cool, water.”

W22.details: Ideo. in ḥnqt “beer.” Det. in qrḥt “vessel.”

Y3.details: Det. or Ideo. in sš “write,” nʿʿ “smooth.”
